message:
feat(mux): switch to H.264 video encoding with MSE playback

- Add VideoToolbox H.264 encoder for hardware-accelerated encoding
- Use jMuxer + MSE for client-side video playback via <video> element
- Add adaptive bitrate based on client buffer health reporting
- Remove old WebGPU/canvas rendering and zlib compression code
- Clean up unused client.ts and worker.ts files
- Fix input handling to match original protocol format

This significantly reduces CPU usage by leveraging hardware video
encode/decode instead of software compression and WebGPU rendering.
